title: Meyerophytum primosii
taxonomy: Meyerophytum primosii is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. The genus Meyerophytum is part of the subfamily Ruschioideae within the Aizoaceae family. This classification places Meyerophytum primosii among succulent plants, which are adapted to store water in their leaves. The plant's classification reflects its native habitat and growth characteristics.
